articles.author: Tim Fernholz
articles.title: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX - TechCrunch
articles.description: Relativity Space—a rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbit—might just beat SpaceX to Mars.
articles.content:
Relativity Spacea rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbitmight just beat SpaceX to Mars.
On Tuesday, NASA said it hired the… [+3955 chars]
